title: Amtech T1154 Combination Cable Lock
features: DURABLE: This 3-digit combination lock has a 13cm flexible steel braided shackle wire and a powder coated zinc alloy body
MANY APPLICATIONS: It is perfect for securing suitcases, sports bags, rucksacks, lockers, cupboards, toolboxes, etc
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and tool products come with a 36 month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Securing luggage, bags, lockers, and small storage units
